items.title: Myanmar ex-leader Aung San Suu Kyi moved to house arrest, military says
items.summary: The Nobel Peace Prize laureate has been in detention since she was ousted in a military coup in 2021.

items.title: Oil price hits highest since 2022 after report Trump to be briefed on new Iran options

items.title: 'How are we going to get back home?' Islamist group tightens blockade on Mali capital
items.summary: The blockade comes days after Mali's defence minister was assassinated in a series of nationwide attacks.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: FCC表決推動禁用中國實驗室認證　持續與北京脫鉤
items.summary: 美國聯邦傳播委員會（FCC）今天表決推動一項提案，內容旨在實質禁止中國實驗室為擬在美國使用的電子設備進行測試，這些設備包括智慧型手機與相機。  法新社報導，FCC去年已禁止由「外國對手」擁有...…

items.title: 英王對美國是訪問近尾聲　川普讚他是「最偉大的國王」
items.summary: 美國總統川普（Donald Trump）今天在白宮歡送儀式上讚揚英王查爾斯三世（Charles Ⅲ）是「最偉大的國王」，並稱美國需要更多像英國君主這樣的人。  法新社報導，這場正式的道別儀式...…

items.title: 緬甸官媒：翁山蘇姬已轉為居家軟禁
items.summary: 緬甸官方媒體昨晚報導，被拘留的翁山蘇姬已被轉為居家軟禁，將在指定住所繼續服刑。當局宣布此消息前，被判處33年徒刑的翁山蘇姬剛獲特赦減刑，但至今仍下落不明，且自審判結束以來，她就未曾公開露面。...…
